title: Implement a maintenance program for an aquatic environment
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement a maintenance program for an aquatic environment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for maintenance activities

pcs.text: Identify and apply requirements for maintenance of aquatic environment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and apply requirements for maintenance of aquatic environment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and apply requirements for maintenance of aquatic environment.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to address risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to address risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to address risks.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare tools, equipment and machinery for use.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Identify environmental implications associated with maintenance activities and report to supervisor

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental implications associated with maintenance activities and report to supervisor.

elements.title: Maintain aquatic organisms

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor aquatic plants and animals and record and maintain relevant data and apply to aquatic plant maintenance activities.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement control methods for excess aquatic animals and plants, and identified pest animals and plants.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Process waste plant and animal material with regards to environmental issues.
